title: QWORK® 30Pcs Frosted Green Artificial Eucalyptus Stems for Wedding and Home Decoration
features: Includes 30 artificial eucalyptus stems with clear leaf texture and white velvet powder for a realistic overall effect.
Each stem measures approximately 38cm and can be easily twisted and trimmed for versatile use.
Made from plastic and iron wire, offering a realistic appearance and durability.
Frosted green color adds a touch of elegance and is maintenance-free, requiring no water or sunlight.
Ideal for a variety of occasions: weddings, holiday décor, birthday , and garden arrangement.
description: Product Description About Qwork Save more, get more No ads, just low prices and good stuff. We keep it simple and make sure you get the best for less. Choose Qwork, where your money works harder for you.
